title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Cash & Carry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Cash & Carry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Metro Cash & Carry in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Metro Cash & Carry:
Metro Cash & Carry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
